zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale於1163年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Odinel d'Umfraville II38歲，母親Aveline Lucy43歲。他於1192年之前與Margaret de Balliol在英國諾圖波藍德卡素結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1216年登記服兵役。他去世於1226年10月11日在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多享年63歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale于1163年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Odinel d'Umfraville II38岁，母亲Aveline Lucy43岁。他于1192年之前与Margaret de Balliol在英国諾圖波藍德卡素结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1216年登记服兵役。他去世于1226年10月11日在英国諾圖波藍德普盧多享年63岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Umfreville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale was born in 1163, in Northumberland, England, his father, Odinel d'Umfraville II, was 38 and his mother, Aveline Lucy, was 43. He married Margaret de Balliol before 1192, in Castle, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1216. He died on 11 October 1226, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hexham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale est né en 1163, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Odinel d'Umfraville II, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Aveline Lucy, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Balliol avant 1192, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1216. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1226, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Hexham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale 1163 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Odinel d'Umfraville II 38 und seine Mutter Aveline Lucy 43. Er hat vor 1192 in Castle, Northumberland, England Margaret de Balliol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1216 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1226 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England und wurde in Hexham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale è nato il nel 1163 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Odinel d'Umfraville II, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Aveline Lucy, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Balliol prima del 1192, nel Castle, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1216. Morì il 11 ottobre 1226, nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Hexham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdaleが1163年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Odinel d'Umfraville IIは38歳，母Aveline Lucyは43歳であった。1192年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルでMargaret de Balliolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1216年に兵役登録をした。彼は1226年10月11日にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで63歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヘクスハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(이)가 1163년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Odinel d'Umfraville II(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline Lucy(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1192년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 Margaret de Balliol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1226년 10월 11일 영국 노르스벌랜드 플루드호에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 헤스함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale nasceu em 1163, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Aveline Lucy, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Balliol antes 1192, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1216. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1226, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale родился в 1163 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Odinel d'Umfraville II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline Lucy, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Balliol перед 1192 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1216 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 октября 1226 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хексхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale nació en 1163, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Aveline Lucy, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Margaret de Balliol antes de 1192, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1216. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1226, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Hexham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
